name: Creamed Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In an 8-quart pot, bring chicken, water, bouillon cubes and pepper to a boil. Reduce heat, partially cover and simmer for 15 minutes, skimming foam from the surface a few times.
2. Meanwhile, cut onions into 3/4-inch chunks (yielding about 3 cups), and carrots into 3/4-inch chunks (about 2 1/2 cups). Add vegetables to the pot and return to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer partially covered for 10 minutes or until chicken comes off the bone easily. Using a slotted spoon, remove legs to a large plate or bowl.
3. Return broth to a simmer. Whisk milk, cream and flour in a small bowl until blended. Whisking constantly, slowly pour into simmering broth. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes until thickened.
4. When chicken is cool enough to handle, pull meat off bones and tear into shreds. Return meat to the pot.
5. Cool, then remove 6 cups for the Creamed Chicken over Noodles by frozen-assets@xc.org (MOMnAaron) on May 23, 1998.
